title: Take Me Home
original_title: สุขสันต์วันกลับบ้าน
overview: After losing his memory from an accident, Tan tried to find his identity. Eventually, he found something and led him back to his home sweet home. The more he knows them, the more he learns to fear of their secrets of his so-called family.
